title: Plant spec → SCADA solution (UI)
description: Golden generator path via AI Studio or Solutions, verified in Explorer/Operator.
prompt: From this plant spec create a monitoring solution: two pumps, one flow meter, an overview dashboard, and a high-pressure alert. I will verify devices in Explorer and the dashboard in Operator mode.
uiJourney: AI Studio (Solution generator) or Solutions → Explorer verify → Dashboard → Operator → Alarms
humanSteps: Open AI Studio → Solution / generator (or Solutions catalog) and paste the plant spec.
In Explorer confirm two pumps and one flow meter exist.
Open Operator overview; confirm high-pressure alert is configured under Alarms.
